hypothesis: Combining EMA with Bollinger Bands and On Balance Volume (OBV) indicators enhances signal quality by focusing on both momentum and trend direction, while considering volume as a strength factor.

The combination of Bollinger Bands (BB), On Balance Volume (OBV) and Exponential Moving Average (EMA) with an upward OBV trend, EMA above BB upper band, and RSI over 50 can help identify strong buying pressure in the crypto market. The strategy will enter long when these conditions are met and exit upon a close cross below Bollinger middle band or ADX drops below 20.
Combining uncommon indicators (EMA+OBV+BOLLINGER) with original filters will extract major market trends.
